title: Trading Update – supporting the UK power system with reliable and renewable energy
snippet: RNS Number: 4793C Drax Group plc (“Drax” or the “Group”; Symbol:DRX) Highlights Good operational performance across the Group Full year 2026 expectations for Adj. EBITDA(1) in line with consensus estimates(2) £450m buyback – first £75m tranche complete, second £75m tranche to commence May 2026 Final dividend of 17.4 pence per share, subject to shareholder approval
ai_summary: Drax Group trading update showing operational performance and financial guidance. Drax is a major competitor in UK renewable energy supply and market participation.
ai_reasoning: Drax is a named competitor in tem's space (renewable energy supply, wholesale/trading, grid balancing). This trading update provides insight into competitor financial health and strategy, but contains no specific information about product launches, pricing changes, or market-moving developments that would require immediate action. Background reading on competitor positioning.
